answers: 3D modeling = creating digital 3D objects. Used in gaming, film, architecture, product design, and 3D printing.
Software: Blender (free, powerful), Maya (industry), ZBrush (sculpting), SketchUp (architecture), Fusion 360 (engineering).
Start with Blender: free, huge community, tons of tutorials. Learn box modeling, then sculpting, texturing, and rendering.
3D modeling path: basic shapes → modeling → UV mapping → texturing → lighting → rendering → animation.
